title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0251
summary: 1 Respondent brought this suit to reclaim property which the Alien Property Custodian,1 acting under § 5(b) of the Trading With the Enemy Act, 40 Stat. § 1 et seq., 50 U.S.C.A.Appendix, § 1 et seq., as amended by the First War Powers Act of 1941, § 301, 55 Stat.
